/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/SQLSyncAdmin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/backend/AdminController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/backend/SetupWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/backend/TeardownWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/WizardSidebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/ConnectionPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/ConfigurePage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/InstallPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/SummaryPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/UsersPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/ui/pages/TeardownPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SQLSyncAdmin.dir/SQLSyncAdmin_autogen/2SEMU33LXP/qrc_sqlsyncadmin.cpp.o -o SQLSyncAdmin  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
